# Copilot Repository Instructions

This repository stores portable AI skill content.

## Primary Router

Use [`qa-strategist/SKILL.md`](../qa-strategist/SKILL.md) to choose the right QA strategist sub-skill.

## When To Use QA Strategist

- Testing, coverage, QA audits, specs, release readiness, rollback, observability, data safety
- Bug-fix execution requests such as "fix GitHub issue", "fix this ticket", "reproduce the bug", "write a failing test", or "open a PR"
- Planning requests such as "prioritize issues", "what should we work on next", or "urgent bug triage"
- Improvements to this repository's own CI, evals, release discipline, and bug-fix process

## Authoring Constraint

Keep reusable skill docs assistant-neutral. Assistant-specific behavior belongs in repository instruction files, not in shared skill markdown.
